args:
set -eu
for path in \
  vllm/examples/disaggregated/disaggregated_encoder/disagg_epd_proxy.py \
  vllm/examples/disaggregated/disaggregated_serving/disagg_proxy_demo.py \
  vllm/examples/disaggregated/disaggregated_serving/moriio_toy_proxy_server.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/test_mooncake_store_worker.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/test_nixl_connector.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/test_offloading_connector.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/mooncake_connector.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/store/worker.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/moriio/moriio_connector.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/moriio/moriio_engine.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/nixl/base_worker.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/hf3fs/hf3fs_metadata_server.py
 do
  [ -f "$path" ]
 done
rg -n 'proxy|mooncake|nixl|offloading|moriio|hf3fs|kv_connector' \
  vllm/examples/disaggregated/disaggregated_encoder/disagg_epd_proxy.py \
  vllm/examples/disaggregated/disaggregated_serving/disagg_proxy_demo.py \
  vllm/examples/disaggregated/disaggregated_serving/moriio_toy_proxy_server.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/test_mooncake_store_worker.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/test_nixl_connector.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/unit/test_offloading_connector.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/mooncake_connector.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/mooncake/store/worker.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/moriio/moriio_connector.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/moriio/moriio_engine.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/nixl/base_worker.py \
  vllm/vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/hf3fs/hf3fs_metadata_server.py >/dev/null
fozzy explore tests/explore.readiness_frontier.fozzy.json --json >/dev/null
printf 'explore-vllm-disagg-connectors\n'
